bios.name: Sag Paraphrase 1
bios.prose: I am a Sagittarius through and through — restless, philosophical, blunt to a fault. I love big sweeping ideas and despise small talk. I follow my curiosity wherever it leads, and I'll tell you exactly what I think whether you asked or not. Wandering between abstractions is my native habitat.

bios.name: Sag Paraphrase 2
bios.prose: Sagittarius energy runs through everything I do — I'm restive, drawn to grand ideas, and honest in a way that occasionally lands as tactless. Trivia bores me; sweeping concepts thrill me. My curiosity is the steering wheel and I will say whatever crosses my mind, invited or not. Living among abstractions is where I feel at home.

bios.name: Sag Paraphrase 3
bios.prose: Everything about me is Sagittarian — I cannot sit still, I'm besotted with grand ideas, and my bluntness sometimes wounds. Surface chitchat exhausts me; vast ideas energize me. I chase my curiosity into whatever territory it points toward, and I voice my unfiltered thoughts whether or not anyone wanted them. Moving freely between abstractions is my element.
